summary: -Quick Actions Menu | Entering From Player Controls
description:
GIVEN the user is in player controls
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates down once to the scrubber bar
AND the user navigates up once to enter the Quick Actions Menu
steps.result:
THEN the user will be navigated to the rightmost option automatically
AND the user will hear: "Quick Actions Menu" on initial focus only
AND if the menu times out and closes, when reopened, it will read on initial focus again
